title: GET_UROUTER
text: GET_UROUTER Get static information about the Uniface Router. operation GET_UROUTER params entity UROUTERS.UROUTMON : OUT endparams Parameters UROUTERS.UROUTMON—single occurrence of entity UROUTERS.UROUTMON containing static information about the Uniface Router. Table 1. UROUTERS.UROUTMON entity Fieldname Packing Code/ Data Type Description pid I4 Numeric Uniface Router's process ID host C256 String Uniface Router's host and IP address connet C3 String Connection network to Uniface Router (e.g. tcp ) conaddr C8 String Connection address on Uniface Router (e.g. the port number) lisnet1 C3 String Listen network to Uniface Router (e.g. TCP ) lisaddr1 C8 String Listen address on Uniface Router (e.g. the port number) lisnet2 C3 String Listen network to Uniface Router (e.g. TCP ) lisaddr2 C8 String Listen address on Uniface Router (e.g. the port number) lisnet3 C3 String Listen network to Uniface Router (e.g. TCP ) lisaddr3 C8 String Listen address on Uniface Router (e.g. the port number) startstamp E5 Datetime Uniface Router started at dd-mmm-yyyy hh:mm:ss Return Values If successful, $status is set to zero. Otherwise, see Return Codes . Use Allowed in all Uniface component types. Description The GET_UROUTER operation gets static information about the Uniface Router. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
